arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford will no doubt be reminiscent of the best season in his career, when he fired in 17 Premier League goals in 20/21, getting his campaign up and running against Liverpool. “So we had Victor Orta, who some Leeds fans gave him stick, but he is honestly one of the best guys, like in football, in terms, of just, he is pure.

arts.ttl: Leeds United could be about to get horrific £13m transfer reminder later today
arts.sum: Leeds United tried to sign Gustavo Hamer from Sheffield United in August, but came up short with a bid that only succeeded in angering the South Yorkshire club further after previous transfer sagas in the summer. Leeds tried to sign Gustavo Hamer from Sheffield United in £13m bid

arts.ttl: Leeds United could lose another two defenders for selection vs Sheff Utd
arts.sum: Leeds are expected to ensure Baldock is properly remembered on the night before the two teams play their televised match under the lights. This will be the first match Sheffield United have played since the tragic death of former defender George Baldock.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke's unwanted Chris Wilder record Leeds United will want to banish
arts.sum: The Blades finished that Premier League campaign in ninth place, before being relegated the following year just as Farke had guided Norwich City to another Championship title. The Whites can move joint top of the Championship, level on points with the Blades and end their opponents unbeaten start to the season.

arts.ttl: 'I played for Leeds and Real Madrid but get up at 5.30am for new job away from football'
arts.sum: I liked decorating houses, thinking about them and designing them." Nonetheless, Bravo invested his savings into buying and personally decorating several houses, which he then showcased on Instagram, reports the Express .
